title: preslia cervina subvar. villiflora
side_effects: Preslia cervina subvar. villiflora can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, nausea, and vomiting. Ingesting large quantities of the plant's extracts can cause dizziness, headaches, and even allergic reactions in some individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can also lead to liver and kidney damage, as the plant's toxins accumulate in the body. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Preslia cervina subvar. villiflora for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
